# Internal Fixture Specialized Keeper Skill

Return output in Japanese.

## Trigger Conditions

- Review release-blocking risk before shipping.
- Keep one reusable specialist skill independent.

## Workflow

1. Resolve the release range conservatively.
2. Summarize a block or proceed judgment with concrete risk notes.
